nl_query: Show all approved revaluation requests where the resulting evaluation attempt was created but the evaluator has not started marking within 3 working days of the attempt assignment.
failed_sql: SELECT rr.id AS request_id, rr.script_id, rr.approved_at, ea.id AS attempt_id, ea.status, ea.evaluator_user_id, au.display_name AS evaluator, ea.started_at FROM revaluation_request rr JOIN evaluation_attempt ea ON ea.id = rr.resulting_attempt_id JOIN answer_script a ON a.id = ea.script_id JOIN app_user au ON au.id = ea.evaluator_user_id WHERE rr.approval_status = 'APPROVED' AND ea.status = 'ASSIGNED' AND ea.is_active = TRUE AND ea.started_at < working_day_offset(a.cal_date, 3, a.academic_year) ORDER BY rr.approved_at ASC LIMIT 200;
